metadata.title: Runway Video Generation - AI Video Generator | Marble AI

introduce.title: About Runway Video Generation
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Runway Video Generation is powered by Runway AI's groundbreaking Gen-4 architecture. This toolkit transforms ideas into stunning videos using text, images, and scene editing, delivering professional results instantly.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about Runway Video Generation.

items.title: What is Runway Video Generation?
items.description: Runway Video Generation is Runway AI's Gen-4 architecture for creating videos from text, images, and scene editing.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Runway supports Text To Video (T2V), Image To Video (I2V), and scene editing modes.

items.title: Who created Runway Video Generation?
items.description: Runway Video Generation is created by Runway AI, a leading creative AI company.

items.title: What makes it unique?
items.description: Runway excels at Gen-4 architecture, scene editing, and professional-quality output.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All videos generated with Runway through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: What is Gen-4 architecture?
items.description: Gen-4 is Runway AI's latest architecture delivering superior video generation quality and capabilities.

cta.title: Ready to Try Runway Video Generation?
cta.description: Experience Runway AI's Gen-4 architecture. Create professional videos with scene editing.
